basic_details.job_title: Nuapada District Additional Block Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Nuapada District has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Additional Block Project Coordinator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/B.Sc. Agri./MSW with Computer and Documentation Skill, 2 years experience in Agriculture sector
qualification.details: Diploma/B.Sc. Agri./MSW Computer with Documentation Skill 2 years of experience in the Agriculture sector

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nuapada District Additional Block Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Nuapada District Additional Block Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07 July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Additional Block Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Additional Block Project Coordinator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,250 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma, B.Sc. in Agriculture, or MSW degree along with computer and documentation skills to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Nuapada District recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Additional Block Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Additional Block Project Coordinator in Nuapada District.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position through email by sending their application and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required experience for the Additional Block Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have at least 2 years of relevant work experience in the Agriculture sector to be considered for this role.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a contractual position, meaning the selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment notification has been released by the Nuapada District administration in Odisha.
